text: @deoxysdragon Okay dude, fair enough, THAT is an opinion I can respect. Lucky star, for me, is a funny show that I enjoy. For the next guy, maybe he thinks its dull. Fair enough! I also agree with the "Conveying sexuality through females" statement, it's getting to be overdone. I used to watch Bleach, so I know what you mean. I'm not really sure how Haruhi is similar to Lucky star though (Sure, lucky star has TONS of shout outs to it, that I admit), but to each his own.

text: @Daramue I agree with your last statement good sir, but you know as well as I do that there are many people that do in fact jerk off to Dragonball Z as well as Lucky Star. Believe it or not, I am also a hater of shows that try to convey sexuality through females. It seems all these days that all of them do it (Bleach) and its only getting worse. (Bleach) Anyhoo, the real reason that I hate Lucky Star is its similarity (?) to Haruhi, the show that I hate more than any other.
author: @deoxysdragon

text: @deoxysdragon I'm glad you are making yourself the standard by listing, of all things, dragonball Z. Most people don't feel the need to jerk off to everything they watch, some of them just enjoy it? Why do I have to get some sort of sexual benefit from watching a show? Maybe you do, but I don't (And I sure as hell hope it's not from DBZ). Lucky star is fairly innocent (With a few exceptions) compared to most anime. You're watching it because it's funny, not because it stars lolis.
